verses.1: Blessed be the Lord God of Israel, * for he hath visited and redeemed his people;
verses.2: And hath raised up a mighty salvation for us * in the house of his servant David,
verses.3: As he spake by the mouth of his holy prophets, * which have been since the world began:
verses.4: That we should be saved from our enemies, * and from the hand of all that hate us;
verses.5: To perform the mercy promised to our forefathers, * and to remember his holy covenant;
verses.6: To perform the oath which he sware to our forefather Abraham,  that he would give us,
verses.7: That we being delivered out of the hand of our enemies * might serve him without fear,
verses.8: In holiness and righteousness before him, * all the days of our life.
verses.9: And thou, child, shalt be called the prophet of the Highest, * for thou shalt go before the face of the Lord to prepare his ways;
verses.10: To give knowledge of salvation unto his people * for the remission of their sins,
verses.11: Through the tender mercy of our God, * whereby the dayspring from on high hath visited us;
verses.12: To give light to them that sit in darkness, and in the shadow of death, * and to guide our feet into the way of peace.

verses.1: My soul doth magnify the Lord, * and my spirit hath rejoiced in God my Saviour.
verses.2: For he hath regarded * the lowliness of his handmaiden.
verses.3: For behold from henceforth * all generations shall call me blessed.
verses.4: For he that is mighty hath magnified me, * and holy is his Name.
verses.5: And his mercy is on them that fear him * throughout all generations.
verses.6: He hath showed strength with his arm; * he hath scattered the proud in the imagination of their hearts.
verses.7: He hath put down the mighty from their seat, * and hath exalted the humble and meek.
verses.8: He hath filled the hungry with good things, * and the rich he hath sent empty away.
verses.9: He remembering his mercy hath holpen his servant Israel, * as he promised to our forefathers, Abraham and his seed for ever.

verses.1: Lord, now lettest thou thy servant depart in peace, * according to thy word;
verses.2: For mine eyes have seen thy salvation, * which thou hast prepared before the face of all people,
verses.3: To be a light to lighten the Gentiles, * and to be the glory of thy people Israel.

benedicite.name: Benedicite, omnia opera Domini (A Song of Creation)
benedicite.scriptureRef: Song of the Three Young Men 35-65 (Vulgate numbering; the Greek addition to Daniel 3 - confirm exact DRC reference during Phase 8)

verses.1: O all ye works of the Lord, bless ye the Lord, * praise him, and magnify him for ever.
verses.2: O ye angels of the Lord, bless ye the Lord, * praise him, and magnify him for ever.
verses.3: O ye heavens, bless ye the Lord: * praise him, and magnify him for ever.
verses.4: O ye waters that be above the firmament, bless ye the Lord, * praise him, and magnify him for ever.
verses.5: O all ye powers of the Lord, bless ye the Lord, * praise him, and magnify him for ever.
verses.6: O ye sun and moon, bless ye the Lord, * praise him, and magnify him for ever.
verses.7: O ye stars of heaven, bless ye the Lord, * praise him, and magnify him for ever.
verses.8: O ye showers and dew, bless ye the Lord, * praise him, and magnify him for ever.
verses.9: O ye winds of God, bless ye the Lord, * praise him and magnify him for ever.
verses.10: O ye fire and heat, bless ye the Lord, * praise him, and magnify him for ever.
verses.11: O ye winter and summer, bless ye the Lord, * praise him, and magnify him for ever.
verses.12: O ye dews and frosts, bless ye the Lord, * praise him, and magnify him for ever.
verses.13: O ye frost and cold, bless ye the Lord, * praise him, and magnify him for ever.
verses.14: O ye ice and snow, bless ye the Lord, * praise him, and magnify him for ever.
verses.15: O ye nights and days, bless ye the Lord, * praise him, and magnify him for ever.
verses.16: O ye light and darkness, bless ye the Lord, * praise him, and magnify him for ever.
verses.17: O ye lightnings and clouds, bless ye the Lord, * praise him, and magnify him for ever.
verses.18: O let the Earth bless the Lord, * praise him, and magnify him for ever.
verses.19: O ye mountains and hills, bless ye the Lord, * praise him, and magnify him for ever.
verses.20: O all ye green things upon the earth, bless ye the Lord, * praise him, and magnify him for ever.
verses.21: O ye wells, bless ye the Lord, * praise him, and magnify him for ever.
verses.22: O ye seas and floods, bless ye the Lord, * praise him, and magnify him for ever.
verses.23: O ye whales, and all that move in the waters, bless ye the Lord, * praise him, and magnify him for ever.
verses.24: O all ye fowls of the air, bless ye the Lord, * praise him, and magnify him for ever.
verses.25: O all ye beasts and cattle, bless ye the Lord, * praise him, and magnify him for ever.
verses.26: O ye children of men, bless ye the Lord, * praise him, and magnify him for ever.
verses.27: O let Israel bless the Lord, * praise him, and magnify him for ever.
verses.28: O ye priests of the Lord, bless ye the Lord, * praise him, and magnify him for ever.
verses.29: O ye servants of the Lord, bless ye the Lord, * praise him, and magnify him for ever.
verses.30: O ye spirits and souls of the righteous, bless ye the Lord, * praise him, and magnify him for ever.
verses.31: O ye holy and humble men of heart, bless ye the Lord, * praise him, and magnify him for ever.
verses.32: O Ananias, Azarias, and Misael, bless ye the Lord, * praise him, and magnify him for ever.
verses.33: Let us bless the Lord: the Father, the Son, and the Holy Ghost; * praise him, and magnify him for ever.
verses.34: In the firmament of his power, bless ye the Lord, * praise him, and magnify him for ever.
